com._1c.v8.ibis.admin

Interface ILicenseInfo


  • public interface ILicenseInfo
    License description interface

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      String getFullName()
      Gets the full name of the software license file being used
      String getFullPresentation()
      Gets a localized string presentation of the license
      int getLicenseType()
      Gets the license type
      int getMaxUsersAll()
      Gets the maximum allowed number of users for this distribution kit, provided that the platform software license is being used
      int getMaxUsersCur()
      Gets the maximum number of users allowed by the software protection key or the license file
      String getRmngrAddress()
      Gets the address of the server running the process that obtained the license
      String getRmngrPid()
      Gets the operating system ID of the process that obtained the license
      int getRmngrPort()
      Gets the IP port number of the server process that obtained the license
      String getSeries()
      Gets the series of the software protection key (for a hardware license) or the distribution kit serial number (for a software platform license)
      String getShortPresentation()
      Gets a short localized string presentation of the license
      boolean isIssuedByServer()
      Shows whether the license is obtained by 1C:Enterprise server and granted to a client application
      boolean isNet()
      Shows whether the software protection key is a network one.

    • Method Detail

      • getFullName

        String getFullName()
        Gets the full name of the software license file being used
        Returns:
        full name of the software license file being used

      • getFullPresentation

        String getFullPresentation()
        Gets a localized string presentation of the license
        Returns:
        localized string presentation of the license

      • isIssuedByServer

        boolean isIssuedByServer()
        Shows whether the license is obtained by 1C:Enterprise server and granted to a client application
        Returns:
        true - the license is obtained by server, otherwise - false

      • getLicenseType

        int getLicenseType()
        Gets the license type
        Returns:
        license type

      • getMaxUsersAll

        int getMaxUsersAll()
        Gets the maximum allowed number of users for this distribution kit, provided that the platform software license is being used
        Returns:
        maximum number of users

      • getMaxUsersCur

        int getMaxUsersCur()
        Gets the maximum number of users allowed by the software protection key or the license file
        Returns:
        maximum number of users

      • isNet

        boolean isNet()
        Shows whether the software protection key is a network one. In case of a hardware license, the software protection key is considered a network one if the license is obtained using Aladdin License Manager
        Returns:
        flag that shows whether the software protection key is a network one

      • getRmngrAddress

        String getRmngrAddress()
        Gets the address of the server running the process that obtained the license
        Returns:
        server address

      • getRmngrPid

        String getRmngrPid()
        Gets the operating system ID of the process that obtained the license
        Returns:
        operating system process ID

      • getRmngrPort

        int getRmngrPort()
        Gets the IP port number of the server process that obtained the license
        Returns:
        IP port number

      • getSeries

        String getSeries()
        Gets the series of the software protection key (for a hardware license) or the distribution kit serial number (for a software platform license)
        Returns:
        series of software protection key, or distribution kit serial number

      • getShortPresentation

        String getShortPresentation()
        Gets a short localized string presentation of the license
        Returns:
        short localized string presentation of the license
